Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We have orders 1001 to 1005 For each order we need events Order Created from Orders Items Picked from Order Lines one per line item Order Dispatched and Order Arrived from Delivery Invoice Issued from Invoice and Payment Received from Payments

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Payment Received event one per payment record linked to order_id via invoice because case is order_id

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Usually process mining event log should have one event per picking if meaningful We will include each pick as separate event because timestamps differ

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: There may be multiple deliveries per order 1002 has two and multiple invoices per order 1002 has two so for each delivery record produce a dispatch event and an arrival event and for each invoice one invoice event

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For payments no resource is specified so leave resource empty and include payment method payment reference and invoice_id as attributes

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Always ensure chronological order reflects the real process flow so events are ordered by timestamp within each order

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Order 1001 has Order Created two Item Picked events one delivery with dispatch and arrival one invoice and one payment

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Order 1002 has Order Created two Item Picked events two deliveries each with dispatch and arrival two invoices and two payments

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For 1002 the chronological sequence is Order Created picks dispatch first shipment dispatch second shipment arrival first shipment arrival second shipment first invoice second invoice first payment second payment

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Order 1003 has Order Created two Item Picked events one delivery with dispatch and arrival one invoice and one payment

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Order 1004 has Order Created and one Item Picked event with no delivery no invoice and no payment in the source tables

Text: Order 1005 has Order Created two Item Picked events one delivery with dispatch and arrival one invoice and one payment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Resources are mapped from ids to names using the Resources table for sales persons warehouse staff carriers and billing clerks
